documents.name: Installation and operating instruction (EOS Edge Control)

products.description: EOS Edge The “non-control” variant is switched on and adjusted via a separate control panel. Optional side cover panels with anthracite or black finish Optional guard rail crafted of solid Abachi Optional side cover panels with anthracite or black finish can be added EOS Edge Control This variant is controlled via two heat-tolerant rotary knobs on the front of the sauna heater directly in the sauna cabin. One button each for temperature and heating time is sufficient and makes special electrical installation unnecessary. products.title: EOS Herkules XL S120 HD series
products.description: EOS Herkules XL S120 HD Floor-standing model for the Finnish (dry) sauna. Rock store fits up to 120 kg stones. EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD Floor-standing model with integrated vaporizer for flexible climate forms. Rock store fits up to 120 kg stones.. EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules XL S120 Vapor HD black EOS Herkules Fragrance Vaporizer dish arrangement with an integrated water supply. Herkules Fragrance is designed for retrofitting onto the EOS sauna heater EOS Herkules XL S120. On this sauna heater, it is mounted in the middle of the left and right side wall. It is designed to be filled with water and, if necessary, any doses of sauna infusion preparations or essential oils. No flammable substances/materials may be placed in the dishes. Herkules Fragrance is designed for operation with an upstream automatic vaporizer dosing unit that controls the water filling quantity, the dosing cycle and the quantity of aromas. . Item no. 946826
